The NOURIÉ Station

Not a machine.
A brand touchpoint.

Every NOURIÉ unit is a Vendify Model 1.0 — 60 slots, touchscreen, refrigerated, anti-fog double-pane glass. Wrapped in your brand. Impossible to ignore.

Vendify Model 1.0

Custom-wrapped to
match your aesthetic.

The machine wrapped in your brand colors, logo, and design language. It doesn't look like a vending machine — it looks like it was always meant to be there.

Curated Product Display
Color-coded product rows make browsing effortless. Clients see what they want at a glance — wellness drinks, snacks, essentials, all beautifully organized.
Premium Touchscreen Interface
The built-in touchscreen lets clients browse products, select items, and pay contactlessly — Apple Pay, Google Pay, Visa, MC, Amex. Zero friction, premium feel.
Custom Branding

Your space.
Your brand.
Our machine.

Full-Surface Custom Wrap
Every inch of the machine is wrapped in your brand palette, logo, and visual identity. Includes the NOURIÉ brand mark integrated cleanly.
Branded Touchscreen UI
The on-screen interface carries your brand messaging, colors, and welcome text — a seamless extension of your guest experience.
You Approve the Design
Before installation, you review and approve the wrap design. Nothing goes on your floor until it looks exactly right.

The NOURIÉ Concept

Wellness, curated
for your environment.

NOURIÉ transforms the ordinary amenity into a premium brand touchpoint. Every station is thoughtfully designed, custom-wrapped, and stocked with products your clientele already trusts.

Premium
Recognizable wellness brands, never generic items.
Minimal
Design that complements your aesthetic, not fights it.
Hospitality
Managed and restocked weekly. Zero effort from you.
Revenue
Earn a passive monthly share from every sale.
The Process

Simple by design.

01
Discovery
We visit your space, understand your clientele, and recommend the perfect NOURIÉ configuration. Takes 20 minutes.
02
Design & Wrap
We create a custom machine wrap matching your brand. You approve the design and product mix before anything ships.
03
Install & Launch
We deliver, install, and fully stock your station. Cashless system activated. Takes under 2 hours. You just earn.
04
Restock & Earn
NOURIÉ manages all restocking and maintenance weekly. Your revenue share deposits monthly, automatically.

Three collections.
One standard.

Every item in every NOURIÉ station is intentionally selected. No generic fillers. No bulk-bin brands. The same quality standard your clients already expect from your space.

Why Partner

The business case
for your space.

Enhanced Guest Experience
A curated NOURIÉ station signals you care about every detail — a premium brand touchpoint, not a convenience item.
Passive Revenue Stream
Earn a percentage of every sale deposited monthly. Your station justifies its floor space from day one.
Zero Operational Burden
Installation, restocking, maintenance, payments — NOURIÉ handles everything. You never touch the station.
Premium Curation
Recognizable wellness and gourmet brands — never generic inventory. Every product is intentional.
Custom Brand Integration
Your station is wrapped to reflect your colors and aesthetic. It becomes part of your space's visual identity.
No Cost. No Risk.
30-day free trial. If it isn't the right fit, we remove it — no questions, no fees, no awkward conversations.

Questions

Frequently asked questions.

Is there really no cost to my business? +
Correct. NOURIÉ provides the station, installation, product stocking, weekly restocking, and full maintenance at no charge. We earn revenue from product sales and share a percentage with you monthly.
How is the revenue share calculated? +
Revenue share is calculated as a percentage of total net sales from your station each calendar month. Payments are issued monthly via ACH or check with a detailed statement.
What happens after the 30-day free trial? +
After the trial we review performance together. If it's not working, we remove the station at no cost. If it's working, we continue under standard 90-day terms.
How much floor space does the station require? +
Standard footprint is approximately 24" wide × 30" deep. Alternative placements can be discussed during the discovery visit.
Can I choose which products go in my station? +
Yes. Curation is collaborative. During the discovery visit we learn about your clientele and propose a product mix — you have approval before installation.
Do I need to do anything after installation? +
Nothing. NOURIÉ handles all restocking and maintenance weekly. Contact your account manager if anything needs attention between visits.

Our Story

The NOURIÉ Concept

Born from the belief that every great space deserves amenities that match its standard.

Why We Built This

Wellness-forward convenience
for modern spaces.

Some ideas begin with a problem. NOURIÉ began with a feeling — walking into a beautiful, carefully designed space and encountering a vending machine in the corner. Loud branding. Generic products. A machine that communicated the opposite of everything the business had worked to build.

NOURIÉ was created to solve that disconnect. We believe every great space deserves amenities that match its standard — not generic convenience, not an afterthought. A curated, beautifully designed self-service experience that feels like it was always meant to be there.

We are not in the vending business. We are in the business of elevating spaces.

Premium
We source exclusively from wellness and gourmet brands that clients recognize and trust. Every item is intentional.
Minimal
Our station design and operational model are built around simplicity. Visually clean. Quietly functional.
Hospitality
We approach every partnership the way a boutique hotel approaches its guest experience — with genuine care.
Our Parent Company
Hearthstone & Co.
Workforce Solutions

NOURIÉ is a specialty program of Hearthstone & Co. Workforce Solutions, a credentialed healthcare staffing agency serving Greater Houston — a subsidiary of The Shiylohe Collective, a veteran-owned parent company.

The Shiylohe Collective
Veteran-owned.
Houston-based.

Built on the principle that business can be both principled and exceptional. NOURIÉ carries that standard into every space it serves.

your space?

Start Your Trial

Request a Station

No cost. No lease. No commitment. We'll reach out within 48 hours.

What to Expect
Step One
Submit your request. Our team reviews every submission personally.
Step Two
We call within 48 hours to schedule a 20-minute discovery visit.
Step Three
We assess your space and present a custom station proposal.
Step Four
Installation at your convenience. Your 30-day trial begins on install day.

Our Promise

No obligation after your free trial. If NOURIÉ isn't the right fit, we remove the station — no questions, no charges, no awkward conversations.

By submitting you agree to be contacted by our team. We do not share your information.

✦  Thank you. Your request has been received. Our team will be in touch within 48 hours.
